description: Primary USDC prepaid vault for the Callora API marketplace. Handles deposits, per-call deductions, withdrawals, and optional routing of deducted funds to a settlement or revenue-pool contract.

VaultMeta.description: On-chain vault state returned by init and get_meta.

owner.description: Vault owner; always permitted to deposit and withdraw.

balance.description: Tracked USDC balance in token base units (stroops).

authorized_caller.description: Address permitted to call deduct/batch_deduct. Null means only the owner may deduct.

min_deposit.description: Minimum accepted deposit amount. Defaults to 1.

DeductItem.description: Single entry in a batch_deduct call.

amount.description: Amount to deduct in token base units; must be > 0.

request_id.description: Optional tracking identifier. When provided it is enforced as a single-use idempotency key.

functions.name: init
functions.description: Initialize the vault. Can only be called once. The owner must authorize the transaction.

params.name: owner
params.description: Vault owner address; must authorize.

params.name: usdc_token
params.description: USDC token contract address (must not equal the vault address).

params.name: initial_balance
params.description: Pre-seeded tracked balance. USDC must already be held by the vault. Defaults to 0.

params.name: authorized_caller
params.description: Address allowed to trigger deductions. Defaults to none (owner only).

params.name: min_deposit
params.description: Minimum per-deposit amount. Defaults to 1.

params.name: revenue_pool
params.description: Optional informational revenue-pool contract address. Must not equal vault address.

params.name: max_deduct
params.description: Maximum amount per single deduct call. Defaults to i128::MAX (no cap). Must be positive and >= min_deposit.

panics: "vault already initialized" â€” called more than once.
"initial balance must be non-negative" â€” initial_balance < 0.
"min_deposit must be non-negative" â€” min_deposit < 0.
"max_deduct must be positive" â€” max_deduct <= 0.
"min_deposit cannot exceed max_deduct" â€” constraint violation.
"usdc_token cannot be vault address" â€” self-reference guard.
"revenue_pool cannot be vault address" â€” self-reference guard.

functions.name: deposit
functions.description: Transfer USDC from depositor into vault and increase tracked balance. Blocked when paused.

params.name: depositor
params.description: Must be owner or an allowed depositor; must authorize.

params.name: amount
params.description: Amount to deposit; must be > 0 and >= min_deposit.

panics: "vault is paused" â€” circuit breaker is active.
"amount must be positive" â€” amount <= 0.
"unauthorized: only owner or allowed depositor can deposit" â€” auth failure.
"deposit below minimum: X < Y" â€” below min_deposit.
"balance overflow" â€” extremely unlikely arithmetic overflow.

functions.name: deduct
functions.description: Deduct USDC for a single API call. Decreases the tracked balance and forwards funds to the configured settlement contract. Blocked when paused.

params.name: caller
params.description: Must be the owner or the authorized_caller; must authorize.

params.name: amount
params.description: Amount to deduct; must be > 0 and <= max_deduct.

params.name: request_id
params.description: Optional tracking key emitted in the event. When provided it must be unique across successful deductions.

panics: "vault is paused" â€” circuit breaker is active.
"amount must be positive" â€” amount <= 0.
"deduct amount exceeds max_deduct" â€” amount > max_deduct.
"unauthorized caller" â€” caller is not owner or authorized_caller.
"insufficient balance" â€” balance < amount.

functions.name: batch_deduct
functions.description: Atomically deduct multiple amounts. The entire batch is validated before any state change. One event is emitted per item. Blocked when paused.

params.name: caller
params.description: Must be the owner or the authorized_caller; must authorize.

params.name: items
params.description: Ordered list of deductions. Must be non-empty and within MAX_BATCH_SIZE.

panics: "batch_deduct requires at least one item" â€” empty items list.
"batch too large" â€” items.len() > MAX_BATCH_SIZE.
"unauthorized caller" â€” caller is not owner or authorized_caller.
"amount must be positive" â€” any item.amount <= 0.
"deduct amount exceeds max_deduct" â€” any item.amount > max_deduct.
"insufficient balance" â€” cumulative deductions exceed current balance.

events.note: One event per item in order.

functions.name: withdraw
functions.description: Transfer USDC from the vault to the owner. Allowed while paused (recovery path).

params.name: amount
params.description: Amount to withdraw; must be > 0 and <= balance.

panics: "amount must be positive" â€” amount <= 0.
"insufficient balance" â€” balance < amount.

functions.name: withdraw_to
functions.description: Transfer USDC from the vault to an arbitrary recipient. Allowed while paused (recovery path).

params.name: to
params.description: Recipient address.

params.name: amount
params.description: Amount to withdraw; must be > 0 and <= balance.

panics: "amount must be positive" â€” amount <= 0.
"insufficient balance" â€” balance < amount.

functions.name: distribute
functions.description: Admin-only: transfer USDC held by the vault to a developer address. Allowed while paused (recovery path).

params.name: caller
params.description: Must be the current admin; must authorize.

params.name: to
params.description: Recipient address.

params.name: amount
params.description: Amount to transfer; must be > 0 and <= vault USDC balance.

panics: "unauthorized: caller is not admin" â€” caller != admin.
"amount must be positive" â€” amount <= 0.
"insufficient USDC balance" â€” vault holds less than amount.

functions.name: balance
functions.description: Return the current tracked USDC balance.
panics: "vault not initialized" â€” called before init.

functions.name: get_meta
functions.description: Return full VaultMeta (owner, balance, authorized_caller, min_deposit).
panics: "vault not initialized" â€” called before init.

functions.name: get_max_deduct
functions.description: Return the configured maximum single-deduction amount.

functions.name: is_paused
functions.description: Return true if the vault is currently paused. Returns false before the first pause call.

functions.name: pause
functions.description: Activate the circuit breaker. Blocks deposit, deduct, and batch_deduct.

params.name: caller
params.description: Must be admin or owner; must authorize.

panics: "unauthorized: caller is not admin or owner" â€” auth failure.
"vault already paused" â€” already in paused state.

functions.name: unpause
functions.description: Deactivate the circuit breaker. Restores deposit, deduct, and batch_deduct.

params.name: caller
params.description: Must be admin or owner; must authorize.

panics: "unauthorized: caller is not admin or owner" â€” auth failure.
"vault not paused" â€” not currently paused.

functions.name: set_allowed_depositor
functions.description: Add or clear the set of allowed depositors. Pass Some(address) to add; None to revoke all.

params.name: caller
params.description: Must be the vault owner; must authorize.

params.name: depositor
params.description: Address to add, or null to clear all allowed depositors.

panics: "unauthorized: owner only" â€” caller is not the owner.

functions.name: is_authorized_depositor
functions.description: Return true if the given address is permitted to deposit (owner or allowed depositor).

params.name: caller
params.description: Address to check.

functions.name: set_authorized_caller
functions.description: Set or clear the address permitted to trigger deductions. Replaces any previously set value.

params.name: caller
params.description: New authorized caller address; also used to authorize the call (must be current owner).

panics: "vault not initialized" â€” called before init.

functions.name: transfer_ownership
functions.description: Nominate a new vault owner. The nominee must call accept_ownership to finalize.

params.name: new_owner
params.description: Proposed new owner; must be different from the current owner.

panics: "new_owner must be different from current owner" â€” same address supplied.
"vault not initialized" â€” called before init.

functions.name: accept_ownership
functions.description: Finalize the ownership transfer. Must be called by the pending owner.
panics: "no ownership transfer pending" â€” transfer_ownership was not called first.

functions.name: get_admin
functions.description: Return the current admin address.
panics: "vault not initialized" â€” called before init.

functions.name: set_admin
functions.description: Nominate a new admin. The nominee must call accept_admin to finalize.

params.name: caller
params.description: Must be current admin; must authorize.

params.name: new_admin
params.description: Proposed new admin address.

panics: "unauthorized: caller is not admin" â€” caller != current admin.

functions.name: accept_admin
functions.description: Finalize the admin transfer. Must be called by the pending admin.
panics: "no admin transfer pending" â€” set_admin was not called first.

functions.name: set_settlement
functions.description: Configure the settlement contract address. Deducted USDC is always forwarded here during deduct/batch_deduct.

params.name: caller
params.description: Must be current admin; must authorize.

params.name: settlement_address
params.description: Settlement contract address.

panics: "unauthorized: caller is not admin" â€” caller != current admin.

functions.name: get_settlement
functions.description: Return the configured settlement contract address.
panics: "settlement address not set" â€” set_settlement was not called.

functions.name: set_metadata
functions.description: Store off-chain metadata (e.g. IPFS CID) for an offering. Owner-only. offering_id max 64 chars; metadata max 256 chars.

params.name: caller
params.description: Must be the vault owner; must authorize.

params.name: offering_id
params.description: Offering identifier; max 64 characters.

params.name: metadata
params.description: Metadata value (e.g. IPFS CID or URI); max 256 characters.

panics: "unauthorized: owner only" â€” caller is not the owner.
"offering_id exceeds max length" â€” offering_id.len() > 64.
"metadata exceeds max length" â€” metadata.len() > 256.

functions.name: get_metadata
functions.description: Retrieve stored offering metadata. Returns null if not set.

params.name: offering_id
params.description: Offering identifier to look up.

functions.name: update_metadata
functions.description: Overwrite existing offering metadata. Owner-only. Emits old and new values. offering_id max 64 chars; metadata max 256 chars.

params.name: caller
params.description: Must be the vault owner; must authorize.

params.name: offering_id
params.description: Offering identifier; max 64 characters.

params.name: metadata
params.description: New metadata value; max 256 characters.

panics: "unauthorized: owner only" â€” caller is not the owner.
"offering_id exceeds max length" â€” offering_id.len() > 64.
"metadata exceeds max length" â€” metadata.len() > 256.

functions.name: require_owner
functions.description: Utility: panic with 'unauthorized: owner only' if caller is not the vault owner. Exposed publicly so external contracts can use it as a guard.

params.name: caller
params.description: Address to validate as owner.

panics: "unauthorized: owner only" â€” caller is not the owner.
